auth.loginSubtitle: Estamos felizes em te ver novamente!
auth.passwordRequirements: Mín. 8 caracteres, 1 maiúscula, 1 minúscula, 1 número, 1 caractere especial
auth.logoutConfirmTitle: Are you sure you want to log out?
auth.logoutConfirmMessage: You can sign in again anytime.
auth.mfaSubtitle: Enter the code from your authenticator app
auth.mfaHint: Open Google Authenticator, Authy or a similar app to get the code.
auth.forgotPasswordSubtitle: Enter your email to receive a reset link.
auth.forgotPasswordSubtitle2FA: Enter your email, then confirm with the 2FA code from your authenticator app.
auth.forgotSuccessMessage: Se existir uma conta para este email, foi enviada uma ligação de redefinição. Verifique a sua caixa de entrada.
auth.resetLinkInvalid: A ligação está em falta ou expirou. Peça uma nova ligação.
auth.securityBannerDesc: Os seus dados estão encriptados de ponta a ponta. Nunca armazenamos nem lemos as suas mensagens.
auth.checkInbox: Verifique a sua caixa de entrada
auth.verifyEmailSuccessDesc: O seu endereço de email foi confirmado. A sua conta está agora protegida.

legal.agreeToTerms: Ao se cadastrar, você concorda com nossos
legal.cookieTitle: Aviso sobre cookies e uso de dados
legal.cookieMessage: Usamos cookies e tecnologias similares para fornecer e melhorar nosso serviço. Ao continuar, você concorda com nosso uso de dados conforme descrito em nossa

settings.title: Configurações
settings.unsavedChanges: Cuidado — você tem alterações não salvas!
settings.unsavedChangesMessage: Você tem alterações não salvas. Tem certeza de que deseja sair? Suas alterações serão perdidas.

account.title: Minha conta
account.twoFactorDescription: A autenticação de dois fatores adiciona uma camada extra de segurança.
account.twoFactorComingSoon: A autenticação de dois fatores estará disponível em breve.
account.deleteWarning: A exclusão da sua conta é permanente. Todos os seus dados serão perdidos.
account.deleteConfirmMessage: Tem certeza de que deseja excluir sua conta? Esta ação é irreversível.
account.mfaStep1: Scan this QR code with Google Authenticator, Authy or a similar app.
account.mfaStep2: Or enter this code manually in the app:
account.disable2FAMessage: Enter your password and authenticator code to disable 2FA.
account.devicesDescription: Devices where you've logged in. Disconnect any device you don't recognize to secure your account.
account.disconnectDeviceConfirm: Disconnect "{name}"? This device will need to log in again with 2FA.
account.dataExportDescription: Download a copy of all your personal data. Compliant with data portability rights (GDPR).

profile.title: Perfil
profile.displayNamePlaceholder: Como você gostaria de ser chamado?
profile.avatarDesc: Your profile picture displayed to others
profile.bannerColorDesc: Background color of your profile card
profile.bannerTooBig: Banner file is too large (max 2 MB)
profile.bannerCropHint: Drag to position and use the slider to zoom. Only the area inside the frame is kept.
profile.bannerCropGifNote: Animated GIF: the crop is applied on the server when you save your profile.
profile.aboutMeEmpty: This user prefers to keep an air of mystery about them.
profile.statusPromptPlaceholder: Best emoji to describe your day?
profile.connectSpotifyHint: Connect Spotify to show what you're listening to

privacy.title: Privacidade e segurança
privacy.allowDMServers: Permitir mensagens diretas de membros do servidor
privacy.allowDMServersDesc: Permite que membros de servidores compartilhados enviem mensagens.
privacy.filterDMDesc: Escaneia automaticamente mídias em mensagens diretas.
privacy.showActivityDesc: Permite que outros vejam qual atividade você está jogando.
privacy.allowFriendRequestsDesc: Permite que usuários enviem solicitações de amizade.
privacy.showOnlineDesc: Permite que outros vejam quando você está online.
privacy.dataRequestInfo: Sua solicitação de dados foi registrada. Esta função estará disponível em breve.

connections.title: Conexões
connections.description: Conecte suas contas para exibir sua atividade e facilitar o login.
connections.comingSoon: Este recurso estará disponível em breve
connections.spotifyDesc: Display what you're listening to on your profile card.
connections.spotifyNotConfigured: Spotify is not configured. Add SPOTIFY_CLIENT_ID and SPOTIFY_CLIENT_SECRET to the backend .env file, then restart the server.

appearance.title: Aparência
appearance.showAvatarsDesc: Exibe avatares dos usuários no chat.
appearance.showEmbedsDesc: Exibe prévias de links e mídias.

accessibility.title: Acessibilidade
accessibility.highContrastDesc: Aumenta o contraste para melhor legibilidade.
accessibility.underlineLinksDesc: Adiciona sublinhado aos links para torná-los mais visíveis.
accessibility.roleColorsDesc: Exibe cores de cargo nos nomes de usuário.
accessibility.motionSignatureDesc: Choose how transitions and micro-interactions feel across the app.

voice.title: Voz e vídeo
voice.echoCancellationDesc: Reduz o eco em chamadas de voz.
voice.autoGainDesc: Ajusta automaticamente o volume do microfone.
voice.micAccessError: Não foi possível acessar o microfone

notifications.title: Notificações
notifications.enableDesc: Ativa ou desativa todas as notificações.
notifications.desktopDesc: Mostra notificações na área de trabalho.
notifications.previewDesc: Mostra o conteúdo da mensagem na notificação.
notifications.soundEnabledDesc: Reproduz um som para novas notificações.

keybinds.title: Atalhos de teclado
keybinds.description: Personalize os atalhos de teclado para navegar mais rápido.

advancedSettings.title: Configurações avançadas
advancedSettings.devModeDesc: Mostra IDs e opções de desenvolvedor.
advancedSettings.hardwareAccelerationDesc: Usa a GPU para renderização (requer reinício).
advancedSettings.debugModeDesc: Ativa logs de depuração no console.
advancedSettings.launchAtStartupDesc: Open Slide automatically when you start your computer.
advancedSettings.nitroStreamReset: Nitro stream intro reset — you'll see it next time you stream

activity.title: Registro de atividade
activity.description: Visualize o histórico de atividades recentes da sua conta.

chat.welcomeDescription: Este é o seu novo servidor. Aqui estão alguns passos para começar.
welcomeChannelHints: Este é o início do canal {channel}.
{channel} está à espera. Envie a primeira mensagem!

Novo em {channel}? Você está no lugar certo.

stickerPack.havePack: Você tem este pack pelo grupo

chat.beginningDm: Este é o início do seu histórico de mensagens diretas com {{name}}.

chat.addFriendNicknameDesc: Set a nickname for {name} (only visible to you)
chat.copyLinkUnavailable: No link available for this message
chat.uploadAddComment: You can add comments before uploading.
chat.folderNotSupported: Folders are not supported — please drop files only
chat.voiceJoinDesc: You will connect your microphone and audio to this channel.
chat.deleteCaptionConfirm: Removing the caption will also delete the image. Are you sure?
chat.callEndedBandwidth: It appears you've been by yourself in this call for more than 3 minutes. The bandwidth patrol has asked me to disconnect you to save bandwidth. That stuff doesn't grow on trees!

friends.title: Amigos
friends.addFriendDescription: Você pode adicionar amigos com o nome de usuário do Slide.
friends.requestError: Não foi possível enviar o pedido de amizade. Tente novamente mais tarde.
friends.errorAlreadyPending: A friend request is already pending.
friends.cannotAddSelfPlayful: Plot twist: you're already on your own friends list. Try adding someone else!
friends.blockedSettingsDesc: Users you have blocked. They cannot message you or see your online status.

team.leaveConfirm: Tem certeza de que deseja sair deste grupo?
team.removeConfirm: Tem certeza de que deseja remover {name} do grupo?

modals.usernameHint: Apenas letras minúsculas, números e underlines

pinned.hint: Clique com o botão direito em uma mensagem para fixá-la

scheduled.futureDate: A data deve ser no futuro

stickers.joinGroup: Entre ou crie um grupo para criar pacotes de stickers.
stickers.description: Crie e gerencie pacotes de stickers para seus grupos. Os stickers são acessíveis a todos os membros do grupo.
stickers.groupHint: Os stickers serão acessíveis aos membros deste grupo
stickers.uploadHint: PNG, GIF, WebP ou JPEG • Máx 5 MB
stickers.stickerNamePlaceholder: Opcional - padrão é o nome do arquivo
stickers.deletePackConfirm: Excluir este pacote e todos os seus stickers?
stickers.addFavoritesHint: Click the star on any GIF to add it here

errorBoundary.serverLoadFailed: Something went wrong loading this view.

mobileMessages.emptySubtitle: Use search above to find people and start a direct message.

discover.title: Explore Public Servers
discover.subtitle: Browse and join servers that have discovery enabled.
discover.empty: No public servers available. Enable "Make publicly discoverable" in your server settings to appear here.

onboarding.headline: Welcome to Slide!
onboarding.subtext: Your data is protected. Messages are encrypted in transit (TLS) and stored securely. No IP addresses or locations are ever recorded.
onboarding.bulletZeroLogs: No IP, no location ever stored
onboarding.bulletAudited: Industry-standard encryption in transit and at rest
onboarding.bulletNitro: Nitro = better audio and streaming quality

servers.title: Servers
servers.desc: The left bar shows your servers (teams). Click the home icon for direct messages, + to create a server, or the compass to explore public servers.

dms.title: Direct messages
dms.desc: Your private conversations and groups appear here. Click the search icon at the top to find someone and start a new conversation.

friends.title: Friends
friends.desc: Manage your friends here: online, pending requests, and blocked users. Add friends by username and send them direct messages.

shortcuts.title: Useful shortcuts
shortcuts.desc: Ctrl+K or Cmd+K: search messages, channels, and people. Ctrl+,: open settings. Press Escape to close modals.

done.title: You're all set!
done.desc: You know the basics. Explore, create servers, and chat securely. Happy chatting!

privacyMonetization.title: Privacy & Monetization
privacyMonetization.privacyFreeDesc: Every chat, call, and file is end-to-end encrypted. Zero logs. Zero metadata.
privacyMonetization.nitroAddsDesc: Better sound quality, HD video and streaming. Quality upgrades—never security.
privacyMonetization.noAdsTracking: No ads. No tracking. No data sales. We don't know what you say, who you talk to, or where you're from. Your keys, your data.

securityDashboard.title: Security Dashboard
securityDashboard.subtitle: Verify your encryption and trust status
securityDashboard.healthScoreDesc: Overall score based on the strength of your security setup.
securityDashboard.keyFingerprintDesc: Your unique identity for end-to-end encrypted conversations.
securityDashboard.fingerprintPlaceholder: Your fingerprint will appear here once keys are generated.
securityDashboard.recommendationShareFingerprint: Share your fingerprint to verify conversations in person
securityDashboard.verifiedSecureDesc: Slide uses end-to-end encryption by default. Your conversations stay private.
securityDashboard.allChatsLocked: All chats are E2EE by default.
securityDashboard.qrHint: QR code will appear here when contact verification is available
securityDashboard.qrInstruction: Have your contact scan this QR code with Slide to verify your identity
securityDashboard.devDesc: Technical details visible only when developer mode is enabled in Settings.
securityDashboard.devFingerprintDesc: Raw inputs and SHA-256 output used to compute your key fingerprint.
securityDashboard.devVerificationDesc: slide:// URL embedded in the QR code for contact verification.

dmCall.aloneInCallDm: In call alone — others can rejoin anytime
dmCall.aloneInCallGroup: In call alone — others can rejoin anytime
dmCall.collapsedHint: Call is still active. Expand to use controls or drag the bar to move it.

server.leaveServerConfirm: Are you sure you want to leave this server?
server.ownerCannotLeave: You are the owner of this server. Go to Server Settings to delete it.

invite.alreadyMember: You are already a member of this server
invite.orSendLink: Or, send a server invite link to a friend
invite.linkExpiresIn: Your invite link expires in 7 days.
invite.inviteToServerSubtitle: Choose a server to invite {name} to
invite.noServersToInvite: You are not in any servers

nitro.title: Nitro
nitro.tagline: Sharper video, clearer sound, better streams—security stays free for everyone
nitro.hdVideoDesc: Crystal-clear video calls with higher resolution and smoother framerates
nitro.highFidelityDesc: Richer, clearer sound for music and voice in calls
nitro.largerUploadsDesc: Share high-quality files, videos, and assets without compression limits
nitro.hdScreenShareDesc: Present and collaborate in full HD with silky-smooth framerates
nitro.voiceQualityDesc: Better audio quality in voice channels for clearer conversations
nitro.securityFreeDesc: All chats, calls, and files are end-to-end encrypted. Zero logs. Zero metadata.
nitro.nitroAddsDesc: Better sound quality, HD video and streaming. Quality upgrades—never security.
nitro.checkoutDesc: Join the waitlist and we'll notify you as soon as Nitro is available.
nitro.waitlistSuccessDesc: We'll email you when Nitro launches. Thanks for your interest!
nitro.ctaDesc: Unlock HD video and high-fidelity audio for your streams and calls. Upgrade now and experience the difference.
nitro.signInToJoin: Sign in to join the Nitro waitlist
nitro.youreOnTheListSub: We'll notify you first when Nitro launches
nitro.waitlistExclusive: Priority access • Early notification • You're one step ahead
nitro.alreadyOnList: We'll email you the moment Nitro is ready. Get ready for premium quality.
nitro.waitlistCtaJoinedDesc: We'll notify you first. Nitro is coming soon.
nitro.waitlistMemorable: You're in. We'll reach out first.
nitro.waitlistMemorableDesc: When Nitro launches, you'll be among the first to unlock HD video and crystal-clear audio.
nitro.waitlistMemorableHint: Get ready—it's going to be worth the wait.

quests.title: Quests
quests.startConversationDesc: Send your first DM to a new friend
quests.completeDailyDesc: Complete daily quests 7 days in a row
